headline: Stocks Mixed as US Set to Blockade the Strait of Hormuz

headline: Oil Is Off Its Peak - Time to Buy Oil Stocks Like ConocoPhillips?
summary: Oil is off its peak prices, and it could be a good buying point for oil stocks like ConocoPhillips (COP). One way to do this is to set a lower buy-in point by shorting out-of-the-money (OTM) puts.
